data.title: Cohen & Steers Infrastructure Fund, Inc. (UTF) Notification of Sources of Distribution Under Section 19(a)
data.description: On April 29, 2026, a press release was issued concerning Cohen & Steers Infrastructure Fund, Inc. (NYSE: UTF) for its shareholders. The release detailed the sources of the upcoming distribution scheduled for April 30, 2026, along with cumulative distributions paid throughout the fiscal year.

data.title: Cohen & Steers Total Return Realty Fund, Inc. (RFI) Notification of Sources of Distribution Under Section 19(a)
data.description: On April 29, 2026, a recent announcement was made for the shareholders of Cohen & Steers Total Return Realty Fund, Inc. (NYSE: RFI). The communication details the origins of the upcoming distribution scheduled for April 30, 2026, along with the cumulative distributions disbursed in the fiscal year. This communication aims to inform shareholders of the Fund about the distribution payment and provide them with an overview of the total distributions made during the fiscal period.

data.title: FilmUSA Expands Footprint at Marché du Film with New Riviera Village Pavilion, Doubled Interior Space, and Waterfront Terrace
data.description: The increasing presence of FilmUSA at Cannes 2026 showcases its growing significance in representing the U.S. screen economy on a global scale. Headquartered in Cannes, France, on April 29, 2026, FilmUSA, the prominent national trade association, stood as the advocate for over 120 U.S. film commissions. This highlights the organization's vital role in furthering the U.S. film industry's interests on the international market stage.

data.title: KEURIG DR PEPPER WORKERS IN GEORGIA TO HOLD RALLY
data.description: Around 150 drivers and warehouse workers from Teamsters Local 528 at Keurig Dr Pepper in Norcross, Georgia, are set to showcase their strength and unity through a rally scheduled for 9:00 am on Thursday, April 30, 2026. The employees are actively engaged in contract negotiations and are eager to demonstrate their commitment to the cause.

data.title: Mountain Crest Acquisition 6 Corp. Announces Pricing of $60 Million Initial Public Offering
data.description: On April 29, 2026, Mountain Crest Acquisition 6 Corp. announced the pricing of its initial public offering of 6,000,000 units at $10.00 per unit. Each unit comprises one ordinary share and one right, with each right entitling the holder to receive one-fourth of one ordinary share post the Company’s initial business combination. The units are set to trade on the Nasdaq Global Market under the ticker symbol “MCAHU” from April 30, 2026. Following the separation of the units, the ordinary shares and rights will trade on Nasdaq as “MCAH” and “MCAHR,” respectively.

data.title: PACSUN HOSTS CO-CREATED LOCKER ROOM EVENT WITH THE LOS ANGELES RAMS
data.description: An exclusive event was held on Friday, April 29, 2026, in Los Angeles to celebrate Pacsun's partnership with the Los Angeles Rams at SoFi Stadium. Pacsun, a specialty fashion retailer focused on youth culture, organized the behind-the-scenes experience at the stadium. The event highlighted the longstanding partnership between Pacsun and the Rams.

data.title: DEFSEC Ships New BLISS ("Battlespace Laser Identification Sensor System") To U.S. Army Yuma Test Center
data.description: Today, DEFSEC Technologies Inc. disclosed that they have sent out two recently developed BLISSTM systems to the United States Army Yuma Test Center. The devices were shipped to the testing center located in the United States. DEFSEC is listed on the Toronto Stock Exchange under "DFSC" and "DFSC.WT.U," as well as on the NASDAQ under "DFSC" and "DFSCW."

data.title: Board Declares Quarterly Dividend
data.description: In Westminster, Colorado, on April 29, 2026, Ball Corporation's board of directors (NYSE: BALL) announced a cash dividend of 20 cents per share. This dividend is set to be paid on June 15, 2026, to shareholders who are on record as of June 1, 2026. Additionally, Ball Corporation will provide further details on a conference call scheduled for a future date.
